---
title: "AI-powered Qualitative Analysis in R"
author: "Kenneth Benoit"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Introduction 

* Understand basic of LLM - Based text analysis
* Learn the core worjflow of the quallmer tool
* Replicate a real research example
* Start using qaullmer for your own projects
* Know how to validate and document your analysis

quantilab.github.io
https://quallmer.github.io/quallmer/
kenbenoit.net


https://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/doi/10.1111/ajps.70050
https://kenbenoit.net/pdfs/Measuring-issue-salience-for-political-parties-using-LLMs-WEP.pdf
https://journals.sagepub.com/doi/full/10.1177/16094069251322346
https://www.cambridge.org/core/journals/political-analysis/article/codebook-llms-evaluating-llms-as-measurement-tools-for-political-science-concepts/7B323A0E47F782F2698A0AE849EA00DE


Naturalistic inquiry. 

### From Bag Words to LLM

Dictionary approach, sentiment --> dead. 

LLM - Based: 

* Zero shot classifcation
* Context-aware
* Can explain reasoning
